provenance.settings: DFT-D4 defaults: EEQ charges at the molecular net charge, charge-dependent two-body C6/C8 with BJ rational damping, ATM three-body term (s9=1, alp=16), built-in damping parameters per functional; energies in hartree, gradients in hartree/bohr
provenance.note: eeq_charges are the EEQ (eeq2019) partial charges reported by dftd4's get_properties(), recorded once per system on its first functional entry.
